name: grep-search
description: Search file contents with grep supporting single files or directories with auto-exclusion, repeatable --exclude-line/--exclude-path filters, --sort for sorted output, definition-finding mode, and Perl regex (-P) for advanced patterns.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File or directory path to search (default: current dir)

parameters.name: --exclude
parameters.description: File glob pattern to exclude from results

parameters.name: --tail
parameters.description: Show last N result lines instead of first N

parameters.name: --context
parameters.description: Show N lines of context around matches

parameters.name: --after-context|-A
parameters.description: Show N lines after each match (replaces grep -A)

parameters.name: --before-context|-B
parameters.description: Show N lines before each match (replaces grep -B)

parameters.name: --filter
parameters.description: Secondary case-insensitive grep pattern to filter results

parameters.name: --exclude-line
parameters.description: Exclude lines matching this regex pattern (repeatable, replaces | grep -v chains)

parameters.name: --exclude-path
parameters.description: Additional path regex pattern to exclude from results (repeatable)

parameters.name: --name-only|-l
parameters.description: Output only filenames matching the pattern (replaces find | xargs grep -l)

parameters.name: --perl-regexp|-P
parameters.description: Use Perl-compatible regex (grep -P) for lookaheads, \d shortcuts, etc.

parameters.name: --defs
parameters.description: Find function, class, struct, interface, trait, enum definitions (replaces grep -n ^def/^class)

parameters.name: --functions
parameters.description: Find only function/method definitions (def, func, function, fn)

parameters.name: --sort
parameters.description: Sort results alphabetically before applying head/tail (replaces grep -l | sort chains)

examples.expected: Up to 5 matches using Perl regex for HTML attribute extraction

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses grep -rn with multiple --include flags, repeatable grep -v pipes (--exclude-line), output limiting, sort (--sort replacing grep | sort chains), definition searches, and find | xargs grep -l (--name-only) into one step; -P adds Perl regex for HTML extraction patterns.
